title: Eon Duo [Cobblemon]
description: Datapack that adds Latias and Latios to Cobblemon (Currently only supports cosmetic variants with no stats)
body:
There are two versions of this datapack.

# Cosmetic Version

The Cosmetic variant contains both combat and non combat versions of the Eon Duo, the partner varients do not have stats and can only learn fly.  

To change the colour of the scarf you can use any vanilla dyes on your partner variant latis.  

# Combat Version

The Combat variant allows all versions of the Eon Duo to be used in combat and they will always have their intended stats.  
  
To add a scarf to you Latias or Latios you can use any vanilla wool items on your partner, this will give then an evolution with the scarf, to change the colour of the scarf you can use any vanilla dye on your partner. To remove the scarf you can use vanilla shears on your partner.  

# Installation

* Drop the zip folder into both the resource pack folder and your world's datapack folder (or dedicated datapack folder if you have a mod that adds one.)
* Enable the datapack in your world
* Enable the resource pack

# Usage guidelines

You are free to use this datapack on servers so long as they meet the following requirements:
- You must **NOT** take ownership of the models and credit me where appropriate
- You are **NOT** allowed to use this datapack as a form of paid content, the models used in this pack must be available for all users without spending any real-world money, this includes premium currency and lootboxes.  


Latias and Latios are owned by PMC international.  
I do not claim rights to the designs of the pokemon used in this datapack.  

Support thread on the official Discord:  
[Offical Cobblemon Discord](https://discord.com/invite/cobblemon)  
[Channel Link](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1216636675137208471)
